content.speakerText: We had such a good time at the bookstore last week—would you be up for coffee next Tuesday?
content.speakerTextCn: 上周在书店玩得真开心，下周二要不要一起去喝杯咖啡？
expectedAnswers: That sounds perfect! I’ve been dying to catch up properly.
I’m free at 2 p.m. — I know a cozy spot just around the corner.
I’ve got a lot on my plate, but how about Wednesday instead?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应邀约并提供合理选项
语言准确性：使用了恰当的口语表达，如 'be up for', 'I’ve been dying to'
表达自然度：语调轻松，符合日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景核心表达（如 'I’ve been dying to' 或 'How about...'）
